rules: Headings must use Playfair Display with tracking-tight (-0.025em)
Body text must use Outfit with leading-relaxed
Overlines/labels must be Uppercase + Tiny + tracking-widest
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto. Import fonts via Google Fonts in CSS.
Use #003A75 as the structural anchor (Headers, Footers, Section backgrounds)
Use #FF6C00 EXCLUSIVELY for high-priority CTAs (Form submit, Call Now) to maximize conversion
Maintain at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio for text
Tint all grays with a touch of blue (slate) to match the brand

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-slate-200 for cards, slightly rounded (rounded-xl)
visual_enhancers.shadows: Deep ambient shadows (shadow-xl) for floating elements like the sticky bar and main lead form to create depth
visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle SVG noise overlays on the dark blue primary backgrounds to add depth without looking 'techy'.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md bg-white/90 for the sticky mobile CTA bar and fixed navigation. Never use complete transparent backgrounds behind text.

grids_and_layouts.hero: Asymmetric split layout. Left: Value prop, Offer, Trust badges. Right: The Lead Capture Form overlapping the hero background or video.
grids_and_layouts.process: 3-column Bento grid (md:grid-cols-3 gap-8) with prominent numbering (1, 2, 3) using Playfair Display in huge size (text-8xl) with low opacity (opacity-10).
grids_and_layouts.showcase: Masonry or asymmetric grid (md:grid-cols-3) mixing portrait and landscape crops of the provided project images. Overlap images slightly for a 'magazine' feel.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous vertical padding between sections (py-24 or py-32). Container padding (px-4 md:px-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto).

motion.hover_states: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, and slight brightness increase on buttons
motion.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion to stagger the entrance of bento grid items, social proof, and showcase images (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1)
motion.micro_interactions: Smooth transitions (transition-colors duration-300 ease-out) on inputs and form focus states

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on the #FF6C00 accent button passes contrast. Use a bold weight for the CTA text.
accessibility.aria: Add aria-labels to all click-to-call buttons and the Wistia iframe

components.lead_capture_form: Card-based form above the fold. Fields: Name, Phone, Email, Zip, Project Type (Dropdown). Submit button is massive, orange (#FF6C00), and says 'Get My $2,500 Off Free Quote'.
components.sticky_mobile_bar: Fixed bottom bar on mobile only (md:hidden) containing two buttons: 'Call Now' (Blue) and 'Get Quote' (Orange). Z-index 50.
components.booking_calendar: A clean view showing dates (Mon-Sat) and 4 pill-shaped time slots (10AM, 2PM, 4PM, 6PM) per day. Filter out Sundays. Built using standard divs/buttons.
components.wistia_video: Embed Wistia player iframe in the hero section or immediately below. Needs 'aspect-video rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl'.

media.icons: Use lucide-react (Phone, CheckCircle, Star, Calendar, Shield, Award, MapPin).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a multi-page routing structure or conditional render for the landing page '/' and booking page '/booking'.
Use react-router-dom or standard conditional state to show the booking page immediately after form submission without a hard reload.
Implement the Lead Capture Form ABOVE the fold on the main page. This is critical for Google Ads Quality Score and conversions.
Use standard HTML forms integrated with Shadcn Input/Select components. Do NOT use native raw <select>.
Wistia embed code should be a standard <iframe> with muted autoplay attributes.
The Booking calendar on the second page should list out the next 7 days. When a day is clicked, show slots: 10AM, 2PM, 4PM, 6PM. Filter out Sundays.
Include window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || []; and push events: window.dataLayer.push({event: 'form_submit'}); upon success.
Implement the Sticky Mobile Bar component that only shows on max-w-md screens.
Do NOT center align the main application container. Left-align text for better reading flow.
Use generic placeholder names and realistic dummy text for testimonials.
DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or generic fonts for the headings. Import 'Outfit' and 'Playfair Display' from Google Fonts in index.css.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements: inputs, submit buttons, call buttons, calendar slots.
Ensure the layout is highly responsive. The form should stack neatly on mobile and sit side-by-side with hero text/video on desktop.
To maximize SEO and Ad Quality Score, integrate relevant keywords (DFW Bathroom Remodel, Shower Replacement, etc.) natively into Headings.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.

Ensure all fonts are imported into index.html or index.css (e.g., @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400..900;1,400..900&display=swap');).
